fields.explainEn: Unique identifier.
Name of the buffer pool.

fields.explainZh: 数据库管理器为响应页面请求而从缓冲池加载请求页的百分比。
fields.explainEn: Percentage of request pages loaded from the buffer pool by the database manager in response to page requests.

fields.explainZh: 数据库管理器访问缓冲池中存在的数据页的百分比。
fields.explainEn: Percentage of data pages accessed by the database manager in the buffer pool.
Database name.

fields.explainZh: 不使用缓冲池的读次数。
fields.explainEn: Number of reads that do not use the buffer pool.

fields.explainZh: 不使用缓冲池的写次数。
fields.explainEn: Number of writes that do not use the buffer pool.

fields.explainZh: 多分区数据库所对应的分区号。
fields.explainEn: Partition ID in a multi-partition database.

fields.explainZh: 数据库管理器访问缓冲池中存在的检索页的百分比。
fields.explainEn: Percentage of retrieval pages accessed by the database manager in the buffer pool.

fields.explainZh: 本地连接与远程连接总数。
fields.explainEn: Total number of local and remote connections.

fields.explainZh: 本地连接到DB2服务器的连接数。
fields.explainEn: Total number of local connections to the DB2 server.
Total number of remote connections to the DB2 server.

fields.explainZh: 已连接到数据库的会话数量。
fields.explainEn: Number of sessions connected to the database.

fields.explainZh: 多分区数据库所对应的编目分区号。
fields.explainEn: Catalog partition ID in a multi-partition database.

fields.explainZh: 数据库开始连接的时间。
fields.explainEn: Database connection start time.
Database alias.
Unique identifier.
Database name.

fields.explainZh: 多分区数据库所对应的分区号。
fields.explainEn: Partition ID in a multi-partition database.
Storage path of the database.
Active state of the database.
Number of deadlocks.

fields.explainZh: 日志使用占总空间的百分比。
fields.explainEn: Percentage of the used size of log space to the total size of log space.
Percentage of overflow sorts.
ID of the database partition group.

fields.explainZh: 数据库分区组的创建时间。
fields.explainEn: Time when the database partition group is created.
Name of the database partition group.

fields.explainZh: 创建数据库分区组的用户。
fields.explainEn: Creator of the database partition group.

fields.explainZh: 该分区是否在使用当中。
fields.explainEn: Whether the partition is currently in use.

fields.explainZh: 基于该分区所创建的数据库分区组。
fields.explainEn: Database partition group created based on the partition.

fields.explainZh: 多分区数据库的分区号。
fields.explainEn: Partition ID in a multi-partition database.
Time when the current DB2 connection is established.
Active state of the current DB2 database.
Version information for the current DB2 application.
Number of lock upgrades for the database.
Number of connections waiting for lock releasing for the database.
Size of the secondary log space.
Maximum number of active connections to the DB2 database.
Number of connections waiting for lock releasing for the DB2 database.

fields.explainZh: DB2的最大连接数，-1表示不能手动设置此值。
fields.explainEn: Maximum number of connections to the DB2 database. Value -1 indicates that this value cannot be manually set.

fields.explainZh: 连接到DB2数据库所需的时间。
fields.explainEn: Time taken to connect to the DB2 database.
Percentage of free bytes to allocated bytes.
Number of free bytes in the tablespace.

fields.explainZh: 表空间是否自动扩展，ON表示是，OFF表示否。
fields.explainEn: Whether the tablespace can be automatically extended, with ON indicating yes, and OFF indicating no.

fields.explainZh: 表空间名称和表空间分区的组合。
fields.explainEn: Name and Partition Group.
Name of the tablespace.
Partition group to which the tablespace belongs.

fields.explainZh: 多分区数据库所对应的分区号。
fields.explainEn: Partition ID in a multi-partition database.
State of the tablespace.
Type of the tablespace.
Size of the tablespace.
Number of bytes allocated to the tablespace.
Number of used bytes.

fields.explainZh: 表空间已使用的大小与表空间总大小的比率。
fields.explainEn: Ratio of the used size of the tablespace to the total size of the tablespace.

fields.explainZh: 测试IP对应资源的协议连接。
fields.explainEn: Test the protocol connections of the resource corresponding to an IP address.
